notes: Added Kizba/Infrastructure/Pass/LivePassManager.swift — an actor implementing PassManaging that composes the read paths added in earlier phases. Listing delegates to the injected PasswordStoreScanning (PasswordStoreScanner in production); decryption delegates to LivePassCLI (which lazily resolves the `pass` binary via BinaryLocating and runs `pass show <entry>` through ShellCommandRunning). storeLocation() returns the immutable injected store root (nonisolated let, so the synchronous protocol requirement is served without an actor hop). Domain value-type initialisers are MainActor-isolated under Swift 6 strict-concurrency, so the listEntries/show mappings are performed via `await MainActor.run { ... }`. Wired into AppEnvironment.live() for both DEBUG and RELEASE builds (storeRoot defaults to ~/.password-store via LivePassManager.defaultStoreRoot — settings-based override is wired in Phase 8). preview() left untouched (still uses MockPassManager in DEBUG). Added KizbaTests/LivePassManagerTests.swift with five deterministic tests using a private FakeScanner (records consulted store roots) and StubBinaryLocator; reuses internal FakeShellRunner from PassCLITests.swift. Toolbar ⌘R refresh action mentioned in the plan is deferred (out of scope for this brief). project.pbxproj unchanged (PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup auto-picks new files).
commits: feat(pass): add LivePassManager using PasswordStoreScanner and PassCLI
